name: MVP Completion
objective: Complete remaining MVP gaps: DISABLE_AUTH, oracle reset fix, API service layer, LoanDashboard wiring, Oracle voting panel, loan details, glassmorphism styling, and validation
exit_criteria: DISABLE_AUTH env var makes authMiddleware skippable
oracle.ts clearAllData() fully resets OracleCommittee via constructor
frontend API service layer with typed functions for all endpoints
LoanDashboard fetches from backend API instead of direct SDK calls
Oracle voting panel with 3 members, consensus display
Loan details card with ID lookup
Glassmorphism styling (backdrop blur, semi-transparent cards, rgba backgrounds)
